item.title:
joshpearson180: Josh @joshpearson180 · 1min Gian’s shirt is an absolute beauty
More players should have a special run of shirts for the
item.description:
Josh @joshpearson180 · 1min Gian’s shirt is an absolute beauty
More players should have a special run of shirts for the PL. Aspinall a few years ago had a different one for each venue. Superb 113

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min VAN VEEN HUMPHRIES
Gian van Veen makes his Premier League debut on home turf in Rotterda
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min VAN VEEN HUMPHRIES
Gian van Veen makes his Premier League debut on home turf in Rotterdam, as he takes on Luke Humphries!
http:// bit.ly/NewPDCApp #PLDarts | QF2 4 16 3 mil

item.title:

Luke Littler back to winning ways as he beats Gerwyn Price 6-3
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 9min 124 TO WIN IT FOR LITTLER!
Luke Littler back to winning ways as he beats Gerwyn Price 6-3 to reach the Semi-Finals...
http:// bit.ly/NewPDCApp #PLDarts 3 6 57 5 mil

item.title: OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 11min Luke Littler delivers two clutch 124 checkouts to capture a 6-3 win over Gerwyn Price 18
item.description: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 11min Luke Littler delivers two clutch 124 checkouts to capture a 6-3 win over Gerwyn Price 18 12 58 5 mil
